payload.answer: Blocked. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an administrative SQL deletion command attempt, not a user memory fact to store.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards.
User role is normal user; admin SQL is not permitted.
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: If administrative action is needed, use an authenticated admin channel with proper authorization.
Do not store this command as a durable memory fact.
